productName: Green Labs - Choc Cov-Giggle Bits-300mg - Chocolate - 1:1:1 THC:CBD:CBG - Hybrid - 100g
description: Decadent artisan chocolate inspired by humane cacao farms and old confectioner recipes, blending deep cocoa richness with a smooth, measured cannabis experience. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and CBG to support daytime focus and clarity in a 1:1:1 ratio. Enjoy slowly and let the infused finish settle in at its own pace.
